body:
## Purpose 

Add an empty 1-moment precipitation tendency and a single column test case for it

Linked to #2103
Peel off from #2370 

## Content

- Creates the necessary parameters structs for the 1-moment microphysics scheme
- Adds precipitation advection with terminal velocity by upwinding with bottom outflow boundary condition approximated by extrapolation. Precipitation is also advected by the mean air flow, which is done in the same way as other tracers.
- Adds husra and hussn to diagnostics.
- Fixes a bug by replacing a non-existing `TD.PhaseNonEquil_ρeq`  with `TD.PhaseNonEquil`
- Adds an initial condition for a precipitating single column
- Adds two jobs to the CI - aquaplanet with 1-moment microphysics and a single column precipitation test case

## Checks
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Add an empty 1-moment precipitation tendency
